title: Move tracked snapshot publication off the request path behind revisioned background reconciliation
summary: Demote tracked `.prism/state` coordination publication from mandatory synchronous mutation work to a lagging derived surface keyed by authoritative coordination revision, with explicit dirty markers and background reconciliation so request latency stops depending on rewriting repo-published snapshot shards and manifests.

acceptance.label: Hot-path coordination mutations can succeed without synchronously rewriting tracked coordination snapshot shards
Tracked snapshot lag is explicitly versioned and observable rather than silently hidden
Background reconciliation can catch tracked snapshot state up to the authoritative shared coordination revision after crashes or restarts
